name: apd
description: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines for Codex with mechanical guardrails for AI-assisted software development.

interface.shortDescription: Enforced spec → builder → reviewer → verifier pipeline
interface.longDescription: APD (Agent Pipeline Development) enforces a disciplined workflow: every change moves through spec, builder, reviewer, and verifier gates with mechanical enforcement. This plugin surfaces the four phase skills (brainstorm, tdd, debug, finish) in Codex's slash menu. The MCP server (apd_mcp_server.py) registered separately provides the pipeline-advance, guard-scope, and related enforcement tools.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap APD: run apd_doctor and gap analysis.
Brainstorm a new APD spec card.
